creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #30)
No, 2.45 is a development release series for the upcoming 2.46, thus the latest release series remains 2.44. This still follows GNOME's old even-odd release-development versioning split.

Build tests are not the biggest issue, but rather runtime has gotten very dodgy since 2.38, if it runs at all. Please keep testing and reporting runtime issues if/when they come up.
